title: The Unexpected Package
content: One rainy afternoon, Ethan received a package he did not remember ordering. Curious and slightly confused, he carefully checked the label several times before opening it. Inside the box, he discovered an old photo album filled with family pictures from many years earlier. After making several phone calls, Ethan learned that a distant relative had found the album while cleaning an attic and decided to send it to him. The photographs showed birthdays, vacations, and relatives he barely remembered from childhood. Ethan spent the rest of the evening quietly turning pages and listening to stories from his parents about the people in the pictures. The unexpected package brought back memories he thought had disappeared long ago.
